$comment: Layer D for SENIOR: static data-flow equivalence between the IR and migrated candidate A. SENIOR derives from the flag constants {0,1} (MOVE 0 init + SET SENIOR TO TRUE lowered to MOVE 1), DISCOUNT from WS-AMOUNT with constant 15 and a decimal shift of 2, rounded half-up; the flag/discount guard is control flow, unioned flow-insensitively on both sides.
